nodes.label: MtxHeader component
nodes.description: App-level header with time-based greeting (Buenos días/tardes/noches), dynamic subtitle, and notification bell button with neon badge counter. Props: name, subtitle, notifCount, onNotif.

nodes.label: MtxTabBar component
nodes.description: Bottom navigation bar with 5 tabs: home, explore, ai, community, profile. Active tab highlighted with neon color + drop-shadow filter. Props: active, onChange.

nodes.label: MtxStatCard component
nodes.description: 168px-wide glass card for horizontal scroll rows. Shows label, numeric value+unit, sub-label, optional sparkline. Accent variant adds neon gradient background. Props: label, value, unit, sub, accent, sparkData.

nodes.label: Sparkline component
nodes.description: SVG polyline sparkline. Normalizes data array to height, renders as single stroke. Props: data (array), color, width (44), height (18).

nodes.label: MtxSectionHead component
nodes.description: Section header used across all screen blocks. Shows h2 title with optional eyebrow/subtitle and right-side action (text link or icon button). Props: title, action, eyebrow, subtitle, onAction, actionIcon, actionLabel, actionRadius.

nodes.label: MtxScoreHero component
nodes.description: Hero card showing weekly Mentex score with: animated SVG ring (R=42, circular progress), delta badge (positive/negative), and 7-day mini bar chart. Props: score, delta, max, weekData.

nodes.label: mentex-shared window exports
nodes.description: Object.assign(window, ...) exports: MtxHeader, MtxTabBar, MtxStatCard, Sparkline, MtxSectionHead, MtxScoreHero as global browser globals.
